DocumentTypeMention.description:
Identifies the clinical document type for a given note or report.

Used upstream of all IBD extraction schemas to route notes to relevant
extractors and to gate human chart-review effort toward highest-yield
document types.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text.
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

confidence.description: LLM model confidence in the document type (0 to 100). Lower values reflect ambiguous document titles and document content.
confidence.title: Confidence

DocumentTypeMention.title: DocumentTypeMention

description:
Classifies the document type of a clinical note before downstream IBD processing.
Document type determines which extraction pipelines are applicable and
how findings should be interpreted in the context of IBD care.
title: DocumentTypeAnnotation
